---
title: "RQ3 — Damage relative to area of control"
---

> **Status: pending W9.** Assembled once `analysis/control_differential.py`
> produces the descriptive overlay.

::: {.callout-important}
**Descriptive only.** This is a spatial overlay of 2026 cropland damage against
*indicative* government-controlled and former AANES areas. Boundaries are contested
and treated as indicative only. **No differential or causal claim is made** — it
maps the distribution of damage, nothing more (`docs/PRODUCT.md` §5, §9; DEC-005).
:::

Planned figure: validated damage records overlaid on
`aois/control_areas.geojson`, every figure stamped with
`viz.CAVEATS["control_areas"]`.

<!-- TODO(W9): overlay validated damage on indicative control areas; caveat footer. -->
